scenarios.description: children() caches empty element list when only non-Element child nodes and reuses cache on second call
scenarios.path: B0→B1(childNodeSize>0)→B2(shadowChildrenRef null)→B3(build empty list)→B4(return)→B1→B5(shadowChildrenRef non-null & get() non-null)→B4(return)
scenarios.precondition: Element with only TextNode and Comment children
scenarios.expectedResult: First call returns empty Elements and second call returns same Elements instance

scenarios.description: children() rebuilds shadow list when WeakReference referent cleared (cache-miss on null get)
scenarios.path: B0→B1(childNodeSize>0)→B2(shadowChildrenRef null)→B3(build list)→B4(return)→clear referent→B1→B2(shadowChildrenRef non-null & get() null)→B3(rebuild list)→B4(return)
scenarios.precondition: Element with two Element children, reflection allowed
scenarios.expectedResult: After clearing referent, second call rebuilds new list instance
